categories.name: Places you would go to in summer

fun_fact: Summer in India once meant mango pickles drying on rooftops, aam panna cooling in clay pots, and family trips to hill stations. Today, it increasingly means heatwave warnings, wet bulb temperatures, and advisories to stay indoors. Why are our summers getting so hot that it feels deadly? [Read more →](https://sunnyclimatestormyclimate.substack.com/p/why-this-summer-is-so-hot-an-explainer?utm_source=publication-search)
